Programs

Computer Aided Design and Animation

MENU

Computer-Aided Design and Animation Program combines creativity and technology to train the future digital designers and animators. This program offers you the opportunity to turn your imagination into reality, allowing you to create both two-dimensional and three-dimensional designs, as well as produce motion graphics and animations.

The aim of the program is to cultivate skilled designers who can offer creative solutions by integrating digital art and technology. Throughout the program, students are provided with education on fundamental animation principles, digital drawing techniques, character design, modeling, and visual effects. They learn commonly used digital software in the industry and gain artistic skills.

Our graduates have the opportunity to work in a wide range of sectors including advertising agencies, production companies, corporate advertising departments, television and film industry, digital gaming sector, and animation sector, among others. Some positions our graduates can work in include:

Graphic Designer

Motion Designer

3D Modeling and Animation      Designer

Digital Game Designer

2D Animation Designer

Character and Concept Designer

Cartoon Designer

Our graduates can also transition to suitable undergraduate programs based on the results of the Vertical Transfer Exam (DGS) to further their education.

This program provides an excellent opportunity for students who want to enhance their creative and technical skills. Throughout the educational process, our students acquire the knowledge and skills necessary for a successful career in the industry. The program is designed to train professionals who understand the dynamics of the digital world and can make a difference in this field.
